Set Expectations
Here we clearly state our intentions
to our clients and set expections
for both parties.
Create Image Quotes
Once assets are gathered begin
creating the quotes.
Gather Assets
Now we gather all necessary assets
in order to commerce work.
Steps To Results
01
02
03
• Connect all assets to
schedulers / reporting tools
• Schedule content
• Create content calendar
Strategy Session
In this step we sit together with our client
and come up with a plan to execute.
• Client approval
• Content, content calendar
Action
Now we set in motion the plan we’ve
put together.
• All posts are scheduled
and dissemination starts
Reporting & Real Time Changes
Here we monitor, report to client
and repeat successful actions.
• First benchmark report
• Expectations re-established
• Compound effect & 45-day
timeline explained
• Trickle vs Compound.
• Google Drive
• Social logins
• Content
- vids, pics, gifs etc.
